full_text:
Gan Shi 甘始
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gan Shi (甘始)was born in Ganling. Claimed to Cao Zhi, that he had been alive during the reign of the First Emperor. Gan Shi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
